_comment: Single source of truth for the 6 character voices used by the app.
Every voice was generated by Qwen3-TTS-12Hz-1.7B-VoiceDesign in
Session 57's smoke test using the 'instruct' prompt below, then
auditioned by Dr. Sama who locked in this exact set ('I think this
Each voice is now used as the ref_audio for a LoRA fine-tune of
Qwen3-TTS-12Hz-1.7B-Base. End result: 6 LoRA adapters (~50 MB each),
each adapting the same frozen base into Awing in one of these voices.
Peak training VRAM ~5-6 GB on a 12 GB RTX 5070.
DO NOT re-generate these WAVs casually — the Awing fine-tunes
depend on the exact byte content of these reference clips.
test_sentence: The voice of the people speaking together creates a great sound.

boy.instruct: A young boy around 8 years old, bright and curious tone with a small child's high pitch, speaking like he is reading a picture book aloud to his classmates.
boy.description: Boy ~7-8 years old. Used in Beginner mode.

girl.instruct: A young girl around 8 years old with a soft, light, child's voice, gentle and expressive, like she is whispering a secret to her best friend.
girl.description: Girl ~7-8 years old. Used in Beginner mode.

young_man.instruct: A friendly young man in his early twenties, warm and clear voice, calm and approachable like a kind college student introducing himself to a new classmate.
young_man.description: Young man ~22 years old. Used in Medium mode.

young_woman.instruct: A 22-year-old woman with a cheerful, gentle voice, speaking like a caring older sister telling a fun story.
young_woman.description: Young woman ~22 years old. Used in Medium mode.

man.instruct: A kind older man in his fifties, deep, warm, and reassuring voice, speaking slowly and patiently like a grandfather telling a calm bedtime story.
man.description: Older man ~55 years old. Used in Expert mode and Stories.

woman.instruct: A warm older woman in her fifties, gentle and clear voice, speaking softly and patiently like a grandmother reading to her grandchildren.
woman.description: Older woman ~55 years old. Used in Expert mode and Stories.
